data.title: 国际服主线Vol.5 第二章 Part2 更新
data.summary: [Main Story Update Notice] The Main Story Vol. 5, Hyakkaryouran Chapter 2: "To You, Who's Trying to
data.body:
[Main Story Update Notice]

The Main Story Vol. 5, Hyakkaryouran Chapter 2: "To You, Who's Trying to Bloom Alone" Part. 2  has been revealed.

The condition of Nagusa's arm, which was ravaged by the spirit realm, deteriorates... As she dwells on her past and suffers, an unexpected guest arrives.
